description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized human bust with a prominent mechanical or steampunk aesthetic. The head is split down the center, with one side featuring a large, circular monocle or lens apparatus attached to the right eye, supported by metallic rings. The right side of the face is partially skeletal, exposing teeth and jaw structure, while the left side remains smooth and intact. The base of the bust is rectangular and features a plaque that reads 'Auggie Awards Winner AWIE 2021.' Both sides of the base are adorned with circuit-like engravings, reinforcing the technological theme. The entire sculpture has a metallic, bronze-like finish, giving it a cohesive and striking appearance.
description: A metallic bust of a human head with a steampunk monocle, half-skeletal face, and circuit-engraved base, finished in bronze.
description_view_0: Front view showing the split face, monocle apparatus, and the award plaque on the base.
description_view_1: Left profile highlighting the smooth side of the head and the circular monocle protruding from the eye.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head and the detailed circuit pattern on the base.
description_view_3: Right profile emphasizing the exposed skeletal jaw and the mechanical monocle structure.
attribute_subject_matter: steampunk human bust with mechanical and skeletal features
attribute_location_context: No specific installation context is visible; the object appears to be presented in isolation, possibly for display or award purposes.
